General.Name: Curbline Properties Corp.
General.Description: Curbline Properties is the owner and manager of convenience shopping centers. It is positioned on the curbline of well-trafficked intersections and major vehicular corridors in suburban, high household income communities. The Company is a self-managed real estate investment trust (REIT) that is publicly traded under on the NYSE.Curbline Properties Corp. was incorporated on October 25th, 2023 in Maryland, USA.
General.Address: 320 Park Avenue, New York, NY, United States, 10022
